testimonials.description: See what our early users say about MailMind — not marketing fluff, but real metrics.
testimonials.t1_quote: We struggled with cold email for months. MailMind's OCEAN profiling completely changed how we write — reply rates went from 3% to 11% in the first month.
testimonials.t2_quote: The Digital Twin is a game-changer. Understanding our prospects' motivations before we write makes every email land. Open rates consistently above 40%.
testimonials.t3_quote: What used to take my team 8 hours of research per prospect is now 30 minutes — and the emails are better. The Psychologist agent is worth it alone.
testimonials.t4_quote: 2.3x more meetings booked since switching. The difference is that MailMind doesn't send templates — it sends emails that actually reference the prospect's real context.
testimonials.t5_quote: We tried Lemlist, Apollo, Instantly — none of them feel personal. MailMind's multi-agent system writes emails that could pass as hand-written. 14% conversion rate now.
testimonials.t6_quote: The sandbox simulation is brilliant. I can see how a prospect will react before I send — it's saved us from some embarrassing mistakes.

faq.title: Frequently asked
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about MailMind.
faq.q1: How is this different from ChatGPT or a template?
faq.a1: MailMind uses 4 specialized agents that research your prospect in real-time, build a psychological profile, and write a custom email — not a template filled with variables.
faq.q2: What is the OCEAN profile all about?
faq.a2: OCEAN (Big Five) is the gold standard personality model used in psychology research. Our Psychologist agent builds a Digital Twin from public signals to predict how your prospect thinks, feels, and decides.
faq.a3: No — MailMind writes and optimizes your email. You send it through your existing email client or connect your CRM.
faq.a4: We include a Sandbox simulation that predicts prospect reaction and a SpamGuard check before you send anything.
faq.a5: Yes. All prospect data is processed ephemerally and never stored or used for model training. We are SOC 2 compliant.
faq.q6: How fast will I get results?
faq.a6: Most users see a complete, ready-to-send email in under 90 seconds from entering a prospect name.

faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about plans and billing.
faq.q1: Can I switch plans at any time?
faq.a1: Yes. You can upgrade or downgrade at any time. When upgrading, you get immediate access to your new features. When downgrading, changes apply at the end of your billing cycle.
faq.a2: Yes! Every new account gets a 14-day Professional trial — no credit card required. After 14 days, you'll move to the Free plan automatically. Upgrade anytime to keep your Professional features.
faq.q3: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.a3: We accept all major credit cards, debit cards, and PayPal. All payments are processed securely through Stripe or Polar.sh.
faq.a4: Absolutely. You can cancel anytime from your account settings. Your access continues until the end of the current billing period — no questions asked.
faq.q5: What happens to my data if I cancel?
faq.a5: Your data is preserved for 30 days after cancellation. If you reactivate within that period, everything is restored. After 30 days, data is permanently deleted.
faq.q6: Do you offer custom plans for teams?
faq.a6: Yes — we offer custom enterprise plans with dedicated support, custom onboarding, and volume discounts. Contact us for details.

onboarding.aurelius_welcome_1: Welcome to MailMind! 👋 I'm Aurelius, your AI assistant. I'll guide you step by step through setting up your account. Let's get to know each other!
onboarding.aurelius_welcome_2: I'll ask you a few questions about your brand, then show you the powerful tools at your disposal. It takes about 2-3 minutes.
onboarding.aurelius_welcome_3: I'm here to help — if you have questions along the way, don't hesitate to ask. Now, let's begin!
onboarding.aurelius_brand: First, tell me about your brand. What's your name and what industry are you in? This helps me understand the context you'll be working in.
onboarding.audience_placeholder: e.g. Tech startup founders, Enterprise sales directors
onboarding.audience_hint: Tip: "CMOs at B2B companies with 50-500 employees" is more useful than "everyone"
onboarding.aurelius_audience: Now, tell me who you're reaching out to. The more details you give me about your target audience, the better I can personalize the messages. Think about your ideal customer.
onboarding.voice_placeholder: e.g. Professional but friendly, Authoritative, Warm and empathetic
onboarding.aurelius_voice: How does your brand sound? Tone of voice is essential — it defines the personality of your communication. You can pick an existing tone or combine. For example: professional but friendly.
onboarding.aurelius_values: Brand values are the principles that guide your communication. They'll influence how my Swarm approaches each campaign. Choose at least one — as many as you want!
onboarding.aurelius_pain: Last few questions about your brand! What challenges do you face with your emails? Select the ones that resonate — they'll help me prioritize the right solutions.
onboarding.aurelius_documents: Upload brand documents, past emails, or any files that will help me understand your voice and audience. I'll use them as context when crafting emails.
onboarding.aurelius_tools_1: Perfect! I've captured everything about your brand. Now let me show you what MailMind can do for you. Each tool is designed to transform how you write emails.
onboarding.aurelius_tools_2: Click on each tool for details — they're built to work together as an integrated system.
onboarding.aurelius_final_1: Final touches! Choose your avatar and add any additional context you want. Then I'll activate everything and you'll be ready to start.
onboarding.aurelius_final_2: After completion, you'll be redirected to the Dashboard, where you can find me anytime in the bottom right corner. 💬
onboarding.context_placeholder: Mission, slogan, or anything else you want us to know...
onboarding.skip_to_end: Got it, skip to the end

onboarding.toast_voice: Please choose a tone of voice.
onboarding.toast_values: Please select at least one brand value.

tool_descriptions.swarm: Four specialized agents (Researcher, Psychologist, Strategist, Copywriter) collaborate autonomously to create hyper-personalized emails. Each agent has a specialized role, and Consensus validates the final result.
tool_descriptions.digital-twin: A psychological model of the prospect based on the Big Five (OCEAN) model. Scores for Openness, Conscientiousness, Extraversion, Agreeableness, and Neuroticism guide the tone and angle of the message.
tool_descriptions.vault: Store briefs, references, images and documents directly in the cloud (R2). Everything you upload becomes context for the Swarm, resulting in more informed and coherent campaigns.
tool_descriptions.war-room: Monitor swarms in real-time, see agent progress, approve strategies and adjust parameters. Everything from one place, with tabs for Twin, Chat, Tools and API.

security.hero_subtitle: We take security seriously. Here's how we protect your data and privacy.
security.soc2_desc: We follow SOC 2 Type II security standards. Annual third-party audits verify our controls for security, availability, and confidentiality.
security.gdpr_desc: Full GDPR compliance including data processing agreements, right to erasure, data portability, and EU-based data storage.
security.encryption_desc: All data is encrypted in transit (TLS 1.3) and at rest (AES-256). Database connections use TLS with certificate validation.
security.data_desc: Prospect data is processed ephemerally during swarm execution. We never store prospect personal data or use it for model training.
security.retention_desc: Your account data is retained while active. After cancellation, data is preserved for 30 days then permanently deleted.
security.subprocessors_desc: We use industry-leading providers: Neon (database), Cloudflare R2 (storage), Upstash (caching), and Vercel (hosting).
security.contact_desc: For security concerns or vulnerability reports, email security@mailmind.app. We respond within 24 hours.

blog.subtitle: Deep dives into B2B psychology, cold email strategy, and AI-powered outreach.
blog.what-is-ocean-personality_title: What Is OCEAN Personality Profiling? The Science Behind Digital Twins
blog.what-is-ocean-personality_excerpt: How the Big Five personality model powers hyper-personalized cold emails that actually get replies.
blog.what-is-ocean-personality_body:
The Big Five (OCEAN) model is the gold standard in personality psychology. It measures five core dimensions — Openness, Conscientiousness, Extraversion, Agreeableness, and Neuroticism — that together form a comprehensive picture of how a person thinks, feels, and decides.

At MailMind, our Psychologist agent builds a Digital Twin from publicly available signals: LinkedIn posts, interviews, articles, conference talks. Each signal contributes to the OCEAN profile.

Why does this matter for cold email? Because a high-Openness prospect responds to bold, visionary language — while a high-Conscientiousness prospect wants structure and specifics. A highly Agreeable person values warmth and harmony; a low-Agreeableness person respects directness and efficiency.

Templates don't know this. Variables don't know this. But a Digital Twin does — and that's the difference between an email that gets deleted and one that gets a reply.
blog.why-personalized-emails-work_title: Why Personalized Emails Work: The Psychology of Reciprocity
blog.why-personalized-emails_excerpt: The behavioral science behind why tailored outreach outperforms templated blasts by 3x.
blog.why-personalized-emails_body:
Robert Cialdini's principle of reciprocity states that people feel obligated to return favors. When someone takes the time to understand you — your context, your challenges, your world — you feel a natural urge to reciprocate that attention.

This is why personalized cold emails work. Not because of merge fields, but because of genuine recognition. When an email references your recent podcast appearance, your company's funding round, or your known stance on an industry trend — it signals effort. And effort triggers reciprocity.

The problem with traditional cold email tools is that 'personalization' stops at {{first_name}} and {{company}}. That's not personalization — it's mail merge. True personalization requires understanding how the person thinks, what motivates them, and what language resonates with their personality.

That's what MailMind's multi-agent swarm delivers: four specialized AI agents that research, profile, strategize, and write — each bringing a distinct capability to create emails that don't just mention a name, but demonstrate genuine understanding.
blog.cold-email-vs-calibrated_title: Cold Email vs. Calibrated Email: Why Templates Are Dead
blog.cold-email-vs-calibrated_excerpt: The data is clear: psychologically calibrated emails outperform templates by 4x on reply rates.
blog.cold-email-vs-calibrated_body:
Let's be honest: cold email templates are dead. Everyone can tell when an email was written once and blasted to a thousand people. The generic opener, the vague value proposition, the desperate call to action — prospects have seen it all.

Calibrated email is different. It starts with the person, not the pitch. It asks: What does this person care about? How do they communicate? What problems keep them up at night?

MailMind's approach is fundamentally different from template-based tools. Instead of filling variables into a pre-written framework, we build a psychological model of the prospect first. The Researcher agent gathers intelligence. The Psychologist agent builds an OCEAN profile. The Strategist plans the angle and tone. Only then does the Copywriter write the email — calibrated to the unique psychology of one specific person.

The result? Emails that feel hand-written because they are — just not by a human.
blog.ai-agents-b2b-outreach_title: AI Agents for B2B Outreach: Why Specialization Beats Generalization
blog.ai-agents-b2b-outreach_excerpt: How specialized AI agents outperform general-purpose models in B2B sales communication.
blog.ai-agents-b2b-outreach_body:
Most AI email tools use a single general-purpose model to do everything — research, writing, and even strategy. But here's the problem: a model that's good at everything is excellent at nothing.

MailMind takes the opposite approach: specialized agents. Our Researcher agent is fine-tuned for deep web and social scanning. Our Psychologist agent is calibrated specifically for OCEAN personality profiling. Our Strategist agent is optimized for communication strategy and persuasion. Our Copywriter agent is designed exclusively for email copy that converts.

This specialization mirrors how high-performing human teams work. You don't ask your researcher to also write copy. You don't ask your copywriter to build psychological profiles. Each person — or in our case, each agent — focuses on their core competency.

The result is dramatically better output. Each agent's work is validated by the others through a consensus mechanism, ensuring that the final email is not just well-written, but psychologically sound and strategically coherent.
blog.sdr-burnout-psychology_title: SDR Burnout and the Psychology of Repetitive Work
blog.sdr-burnout-psychology_excerpt: How AI automation can reduce SDR burnout by eliminating the most repetitive parts of outreach.
blog.sdr-burnout-psychology_body:
SDR burnout is real, and it's accelerating. The average SDR tenure is now under 15 months. The root cause isn't rejection — it's repetition. Researching the same type of prospect, writing variations of the same email, checking the same metrics dashboard — day after day.

This is where AI shines. Not in replacing SDRs, but in eliminating the repetitive parts of their work that drain energy and creativity.

MailMind automates the three most time-consuming tasks in outreach: prospect research (2-4 hours per prospect), email drafting (30-60 minutes per email), and strategy planning (ongoing mental load). By delegating these to specialized AI agents, SDRs can focus on what humans do best: relationship building, creative strategy, and closing.

The psychology is clear: autonomy + mastery + purpose = engagement (Deci & Ryan, Self-Determination Theory). When AI handles the rote work, SDRs regain autonomy over their time, develop mastery in high-value skills, and reconnect with their sense of purpose.
blog.email-deliverability-guide_title: Email Deliverability in 2026: A Technical Guide
blog.email-deliverability-guide_excerpt: Practical strategies to ensure your cold emails reach the inbox, not the spam folder.
blog.email-deliverability-guide_body:
Email deliverability is more complex than ever. Google and Microsoft's AI-powered spam filters now analyze not just technical signals (SPF, DKIM, DMARC) but also engagement patterns, content quality, and sender reputation in real time.

Here's what matters in 2026:

1. **Domain reputation** — Warm up new domains gradually. Start with 5-10 emails per day, increase by 5-10 per week. Don't blast 500 emails from a 2-day-old domain.

2. **Content quality** — AI spam filters can detect template content. If your email looks like 10,000 other emails, it goes to spam. This is where MailMind's personalized approach has a hidden advantage: every email is unique, so it passes AI content filters naturally.

3. **Engagement signals** — Opens and clicks matter less than they used to (thanks to Apple's Mail Privacy Protection). What matters now: replies. A single reply signals to the algorithm that your email is wanted.

4. **Technical setup** — SPF, DKIM, DMARC are table stakes. Custom tracking domains, BIMI, and proper list hygiene separate pros from amateurs.

MailMind includes a built-in SpamGuard that checks your email against these criteria before you send, helping you maintain a strong sender reputation.
